prompt: Create a step-by-step visual guide for performing the Heimlich maneuver. Use Image 1 to identify the emergency and Image 2 for the response.
prompt_refined: Generate a clear, two-panel informational graphic, in an illustrative style, demonstrating the Heimlich maneuver. The panel on the left should depict the emergency: a person choking with hands at their throat, reflecting the visual content and style of image 1. The panel on the right should illustrate the response: a second person performing the Heimlich maneuver on the choking individual, drawing visual action and style from image 2. The combined graphic should serve as a concise step-by-step visual guide for identifying choking and performing the Heimlich maneuver.
objects: Left panel: choking person with hands at throat
Right panel: a second person performing the Heimlich maneuver
Heimlich maneuver action (second person embracing first)
Exclamation marks (!!) in the right panel
